name: Fried Beancurd with Sweet Nut Sauce (Tao Hou
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the beancurd cubes in half diagonally.
2. Deep-fry the eight triangles until the white side is golden brown. Drain and arrange on a serving dish, then set aside.
3. In a saucepan, heat the vinegar, sugar, and salt until the mixture thickens. Remove from the heat and add the chili powder and ground peanuts, stirring well until all ingredients are thoroughly mixed. Pour into a serving bowl, garnish with coriander leaves, and serve with the beancurd.
